ValidationRule.description: For Invoice Export, must be Internal Account
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL( InterfaceType__c ,"Invoice Export"), ISPICKVAL( InterfaceType__c ,"Cancellation Export") ), $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, Account__r.RecordType.DeveloperName != "InternalAccount" )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please choose an internal Account for Invoice Export. (ABA004)
